title: ACMI defense manufacturing hub expands with new tenants, more acreage
description:

title: First Financial Bank to acquire Peoples Bank parent for $208 million
description:
The all-stock transaction for Munster-based Finward Bancorp, the parent of Peoples Bank, has been unanimously approved by the boards of directors for both companies.

title: Novo Nordisk sues Eli Lilly over ‘misleading’ GLP-1 advertisements
description:
